headline: SLB Signs PETRONAS Subsea Deal, Expands Digital Operations in Angola
summary: SLB expands its reach with the Suriname subsea alliance and the Angola digital deal, boosting offshore development and operational efficiency.

raw.headline: SLB Signs PETRONAS Subsea Deal, Expands Digital Operations in Angola

headline: SLB OneSubsea Awarded Contract for Shenandoah Field
summary: HOUSTON, April 09, 2026--Global energy technology company SLB (NYSE: SLB) announced that its SLB OneSubsea joint venture was awarded a contract by Beacon Offshore Energy (BOE) Exploration and Production LLC to deliver a high‑pressure, high‑temperature (HPHT) multiphase boosting system for the Shenandoah field in the Gulf of America.
